text.p: I wish to congratulate you on your new post as the Chairman of local goverment area. It is not easy to win the Chairmanship considering all that took place during the electioneering campaigns, So the I congratelute you once again.

I use this opportunity to remind you of the lack of social amenities my area. Infact my town, I , has not benefited form the previous government and I hope that you are not going to forget us now as did your predecessors.

There is no electricity good roads S pipe-borne water in my area. The people have contributed a huge amount of money which they paid to the local goverment treasury and nothing has been done by the local goverment.

You konw very well that basic amenities helpin making life worth living. you are also aware of the incidence of guinea worm and other water-borne diseases In my town, so I hope you do some thing about it before my people perish. I hope that you are not going to disappoint us because you promised in your manifesto that these amenities would be provided for us if you were voted in power.
The people of the area good and patriotic and hope accord any assitance solicited by your government. once again I wish you a happy stay in office.
